system.description:
What it does (SRD): At the end of its turn, the creature deals Constitution damage (or the stat block’s listed effect) to a grappled or attached victim. Some entries specify healing to the attacker when it drains blood.

ThirdEra: Constitution drain or damage is applied manually in play from the printed values. This item keeps Mechanical effects and Capability grants empty so the DC, damage, and rider effects stay faithful to each stat block.
